code:
import io
import string

fn factorial(_ n: Int) -> Int
  if n <= 1
    1
  else
    n * factorial(n - 1)
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = io.read_line()
  match line
  when Some(s)
    let trimmed = string.trim(s)
    match string.parse_int(trimmed)
    when Some(n)
      let r = factorial(n)
      print("#{n}!=#{r}")
    when None
      print("invalid input")
    end
  when None
    print("no input")
  end
end
